footer.tagline: SEAPEDIA is a multi-role e-commerce platform that connects buyers, sellers, drivers, and administrators in one seamless marketplace.

navbar.menuDescription: Browse Seapedia or manage your account.

hero.description: Browse all available products from our verified stores.

auth.failedToSignIn: Failed to sign in. Please check your credentials.
auth.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Try checking username/email availability.

onboard.instruction: Let's customize your profile. Select what roles you want to have in this application.
onboard.buyerDescription: You are automatically registered as a Buyer. Shop products, add items to cart, top up your wallet, and manage checkout.
onboard.sellerDescription: Do you want to sell products? Build your unique store, manage inventory, and process incoming orders.
onboard.driverDescription: Want to deliver orders? Receive notifications of deliveries, handle shipping routes, and get driver fees.

selectRole.title: Select Active Role
selectRole.subtitle: Choose which dashboard you would like to open for this session

review.successMsg: Thank you! Your review was submitted successfully.
review.failedMsg: Failed to submit review. Please try again.
review.title: Leave a Review
review.description: Tell us about your experience using the Seapedia application.

landing.error: Error loading products. Make sure the backend is running.
landing.noProducts: No products found matching your search.
landing.feedbackSubtitle: Your feedback helps us make Seapedia better for everyone. Share your experience and rating with us.

portal.title: Buyer Portal
portal.description: Manage your wallet, delivery addresses, and orders.

overview.welcomeDesc: Here you can check your balance, simulate a top-up, manage your shipping addresses, view your cart, and prepare for checkout.

wallet.title: Seapedia Wallet
wallet.historyDesc: List of all incoming and outgoing transaction logs for your wallet.
wallet.topUpDesc: Choose amount and payment method to generate instructions.
wallet.simulateInstructions: Please simulate payment below to complete your top-up request.
wallet.clipboardNotSupported: Clipboard not supported in this browser
wallet.instructionBody: Since this is a simulated sandbox flow, use the button below to simulate successfully paying the generated Virtual Account code.

address.noDefault: No default delivery address set yet.
address.noAddressesDesc: Add shipping addresses so we can calculate shipping fees during checkout.
address.label: Address Label (e.g. Home, Office)
address.fullAddress: Full Address (Street, House No., RT/RW, etc.)
address.titleDesc: Provide detailed shipping coordinates for your deliveries.

cart.errorLoading: Error loading cart. Please try again later.
cart.pageDesc: Review your items and prepare before checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.desc: Complete your order summary and confirm payment
checkout.needAtLeast: You need at least {{amount}} to check out.
checkout.agreementText: By confirming, your wallet will be charged immediately. Purchases are protected by the Seapedia Guarantee.
checkout.noDefaultAddressDesc: Please register at least one address before continuing checkout.
checkout.pleaseConfigureAddress: Please configure a default shipping address to proceed.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.desc: Monitor and track your purchase transactions
orders.noOrdersDesc: You haven't placed any orders yet. Visit the marketplace to find our amazing collections.

report.title: Spending Report
report.desc: A comprehensive breakdown of your completed expenses on Seapedia.
report.historyDesc: All your transactions. Only completed transactions contribute to the financial summary metrics above.

store.nameTaken: This store name is already taken. Please choose another.
store.notFound: Store not found. Please complete onboarding first.
store.onboardingDesc: Your store is your unique identity on Seapedia. Choose a name that stands out!
store.descPlaceholder: Tell buyers about what you sell...

orders.errorLoading: Error loading incoming orders. Please check if your store is created properly.
orders.manageDesc: Manage and process orders placed at your store
orders.noOrdersDesc: When buyers purchase products from your store, their orders will appear here. Keep up the good work!

actions.title: Seller Actions
actions.readyDesc: This order is ready to be prepared. Click below to pack and notify a driver for shipment.
actions.waitingDesc: Order processed. Waiting for a driver to accept the shipment job.
actions.noActionDesc: No action needed. Order is currently in status:

modal.processDesc: Move this order to Menunggu Pengirim status so drivers can pick it up.
modal.notePlaceholder: e.g. Package packed and ready in front of the store...

layout.onboardingDesc: Complete your store profile to start selling.

overview.welcomeDesc: This is your central hub for managing your products and incoming orders. Use the navigation links to add or update your listings.

products.title: Products Management
products.desc: Manage the catalog of products for your store.
products.createDesc: List a new product under your store.
products.editNotFound: Product not found or failed to load.
products.editDesc: Modify the details of your product.

report.totalRevenueDesc: Sum of subtotal from completed store's orders
report.title: Income Report
report.desc: A comprehensive breakdown of your store's completed revenue on Seapedia.
report.historyDesc: All store orders. Only completed transactions contribute to your store's revenue metrics above.

stats.earningTooltip: Earning is calculated as 100% of the delivery fee for completed jobs.
stats.noActiveJobs: No active jobs. Claim some available jobs!

history.title: Delivery Job History
history.desc: View and track all your completed delivery jobs

jobs.pickupDesc: Pick up the processed items from this seller store
jobs.pickupSubtext: Items are packaged and ready to be loaded by the driver.
jobs.dropoffDesc: Deliver the items to the buyer address listed below
jobs.contentsDesc: Verify the items inside the package before delivery
jobs.noneAvailableDesc: There are no delivery jobs waiting to be picked up at the moment.
jobs.earningsSubtext: You will earn 100% of the delivery fee upon successful delivery

layout.title: Driver Dashboard
layout.desc: Manage your delivery jobs, track progress, and view earnings.

layout.title: Admin Portal
layout.desc: System configuration, promotions, and marketplace monitoring.

dashboard.desc: Comprehensive real-time monitoring of SEAPEDIA marketplace system.

charts.logisticsDesc: Distribution of delivery jobs in the marketplace

discounts.voucherPlaceholder: To create a new flat discount voucher, click the button in the top right.
discounts.promoPlaceholder: To launch a new percentage promo campaign, click the button in the top right.
discounts.vouchersDesc: Flat IDR discounts with usage limits for buyer checkouts.
discounts.noVouchersDesc: Create a new voucher to enable buyer flat discounts.
discounts.promosDesc: Percentage discounts off checkout subtotal with maximum caps.
discounts.noPromosDesc: Create a new promo to enable campaign discounts.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.desc: Manage your Seapedia account information and balances.

catalog.visitStoreDesc: Click to visit store page for more items.
catalog.clearedAndAddedSuccess: Cleared previous store items & added new item!
catalog.signInToAddToCart: Please sign in to add items to cart
catalog.switchToBuyerRole: Please switch to Buyer role to purchase items
catalog.storeNotFoundDesc: The store you are looking for does not exist.
catalog.errorLoadingProducts: Error loading products for this store.
catalog.noProductsListed: No products listed by this store yet.
